content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

Reviewed `git diff` against `master` and read the changed implementation in `src/contexts/agent_execution/policy.rs` and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs` plus the related unit tests end-to-end. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the submitted changes. The preflight path now resolves the final-review planner through the dedicated final-review override instead of the generic planner role, and the targeted regression coverage for explicit override and fallback behavior passes (`cargo test --features test-stub final_review_planner --test unit`).

## Amendments

None.
